J 7 fiWTOi 27 ftWt, i*}6N (>rr^T % ^TSTCSJ, ww-II, «*w 3 3Tvw(i) if 3 srfa^iTT tfw *rr ^r ft. 241 fanr 31 wrcf, J 976 (WT^T % TniTW *fftttT 21 "BWft, 197G TT JTTTtVr) MINISTRY OF COMMERCE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th June, 1988 (Rubber Control) G.S.R. 716(E).-—In exorcise of the powers conferred by section 25 of the Rubber Act, 1947 <24 of 1947), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Rubber Rules, 1955, namely :— - 1.(1) These Rules may be called the Rubber (Amendment) Rules, 1988. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Jn rule 19 of he Rubber Rule-,, after referred to as the said rules), - 1955 (herein (i) in the first proviso, for the letters. figures and Words, "Rs. 1300|- per men- sem", the letters, figures and words. ''Rs. 4000|- per mensem in the case of technical posts' and RS. 4,500 per mensem iri the case of non-technical post "subject to observance of the ban orders for creation of posts issued by the Govt, from time to time" shall be substituted; * (ii) in the second proviso, for the Ictieis. figure*, and words, "Rs. 1300]- 'per men- sem", the letters, figures and words Rs. 4,000 per • mensem in the case of technical posts and RS. 4,500 per mensem in the case of non-technical post, "subject to observance of the ban orders for creation of posts Issued by the Govt, from time to time" shall, be. substituted; (iii) in the third provi.v> for the words, letters and figures "in a post tho maximum sal- ary of which exceeds Rs. ]300|- per mensem", tho words "in a key po;n identified in prior consultation with th? Central Government" shall be substituted. 3. In rule 30 of the said rules, in sub-rule (1). for the letters, figures and words "Rs. 10001- in any single case", the letters, figures and words "Rs. 10,000 for loses due to theft, fraud and neg- ligence and Rs. 20,000 for other eases in any single ease" shall be substituted. 4. Li rule 32 of the said rules, in sub-rule (I ). for the words, letters and figures "extends over a period of more than fhree yeari or involves ex- penditure in excess of Rs. 20,000", the words and figures "involves and expenditure in excess of 20 lakh rupees" shall be substituted. 5. Tn rule-47 of the said rules, the words "under- take, or encourage, or cause to be undertaken or encouraged, economic research and also" shall be omitted. LFile No. 13|2|S5-Plant(B)l O. P. GAHROTRA. Jt. Sccv. Note :—The principal rule-i were published vide No. SRO 1662 in the Gazette of India Extraordinary Part II dated the 1st August, 1985 and were subsequently amended by :— 1. Notification No. SRO 549 dated the 14th February, 1957 (Published in the Gjzetle of India, Part 11, Section 3 dated the 23rd February, 1957). 2. Notification No. G.S.R. 27, dated the 27th r>ecember, 1968 (published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (i) dated the 27th December, 1968). 3.
